24	/// never have to name orbit-agent types. The dispatcher calls
25	/// `host.api_key_for(provider)?` then `drive_agent_loop(spec, &api_key, ...)`
26	/// directly.
27	pub trait V2RuntimeHost: Send + Sync {
28	    /// Dispatch a deterministic action by name. The host looks up `action`
29	    /// in its registry and returns the action's structured output.
30	    fn run_deterministic(
31	        &self,
32	        action: &str,
33	        config: &Value,
